data.title: SemiLEDs (NASDAQ: LEDS) stock rises after Q1 2026 results: $2.6M revenue (up from $1.26M), 9 cents loss per share.
data.description: SemiLEDs Corporation (NASDAQ: LEDS) experienced a rise in stock value following the release of its first-quarter financial results for 2026. The company reported a larger year-over-year loss in the fiscal first quarter, with a 9 cents per diluted share loss compared to 8 cents per share in the previous year. Despite this, revenue saw a significant surge from $1.26 million to $2.6 million year over year. However, the revenue fell sequentially, dropping from $13.2 million in the fourth quarter. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) to report Q4 earnings of $12.3/share, revenue $6.75B, staff cuts of 1%; stock up 0.1% at $1,089.54.
data.description: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Thursday, Jan. 15. Analysts are predicting earnings of $12.3 per share, compared to $11.93 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $6.75 billion, an increase from $5.68 billion in the previous year. The company is also reducing its workforce by about 1%, as reported by Bloomberg. On Tuesday, BlackRock's shares closed at $1,089.54, up 0.1%. For more details, including the latest analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.
